name: npm Registry
description: The npm Registry is the world's largest software registry for JavaScript packages. Search, download, and publish Node.js packages with version management and dependency resolution.

capabilities.name: packages_search
capabilities.description: Search for npm packages by keyword, author, or description.

capabilities.name: packages_get
capabilities.description: Get full metadata for an npm package including all versions.

capabilities.name: packages_version_get
capabilities.description: Get metadata for a specific package version.

capabilities.name: packages_publish
capabilities.description: Publish a new version of a package.

capabilities.name: downloads_point
capabilities.description: Get download count for a package at a specific point.

capabilities.name: downloads_range
capabilities.description: Get daily download counts over a range.

capabilities.name: dist_tags_get
capabilities.description: Get distribution tags for a package.

capabilities.name: dist_tags_set
capabilities.description: Set a distribution tag on a package.

capabilities.name: user_packages_list
capabilities.description: List packages maintained by a user.
